// src/components/Footer.jsx import React from 'react'; import { Container, Row, Col } from 'react-bootstrap'; const Footer = () => (
{/* Mission & Vision */}
Mission

Empowering vulnerable women, especially widows, through sustainable fish cage farming and innovative financial solutions to foster economic independence and promote the Blue Economy along Lake Victoria.

Vision

A thriving community of resilient women leading in sustainable aquaculture and blue economy initiatives, ensuring food security, poverty reduction, and gender equality along Lake Victoria.

{/* Objectives */}
Objectives
  • • Promote Sustainable Fish Cage Farming
  • • Enhance Financial Inclusion
  • • Strengthen Capacity Building
  • • Conserve Lake Victoria’s Ecosystem
  • • Foster Community Collaboration
  • • Improve Livelihoods & Social Well‑being
{/* Activities */}
Key Activities
  • • Training on fish cage farming & conservation
  • • Forming women‑led farming groups
  • • Table banking & microfinance schemes
  • • Community awareness on lake conservation
  • • Market access & value addition support
  • • Stakeholder partnerships & monitoring

© {new Date().getFullYear()} BUKANI MAMA TOTO WOMEN GROUP. All Rights Reserved.

Contact Us Facebook Twitter
); export default Footer;
